Schitt's Creek gif. Annie Murphy as Alexis sits on a suitcase, trying to use her body weight to jam her heaping clothes in. She's on the floor, surrounded by a huge matching set of suitcases, and she frantically packs.
Family Guy gif. Peter Griffin frowns as he tries to type with long press-on nails.
